description: Voice AI agents for call centers that handle customer service, appointment booking, and lead qualification for businesses with high call volumes (10,000+ calls/day), 24/7, in 10+ languages, at approximately 50% of the cost of human agents.
key_founders: Shraey Bhatia, Arkadiy Telegin, Kevin Wu
unique_value: Human-like voice AI that actually resolves issues rather than deflecting — tackles the core failure mode of prior voice bot generations. Proven 70% full automation rate.
product_description: Voice AI agents for call centers that handle customer service, appointment booking, and lead qualification for businesses with high call volumes (10,000+ calls/day), 24/7, in 10+ languages, at approximately 50% of the cost of human agents.
how_it_works: Fully controlled in-house infrastructure from model deployment to telephony. No-code conversation builder with drag-and-drop workflow design. Built-in QA module grades each call and feeds learnings back to the agent for self-improvement via A/B testing and automated prompt optimization. Under 2-second latency.
target_customer: Mid-to-large enterprises with call centers (100+ agents) in retail, telecom, BPO, travel, health insurance, and real estate.
business_model: Unknown (likely SaaS subscription or usage-based pricing).
key_differentiator: Self-improving QA loop that autonomously improves with every call; enterprise-grade in-house infrastructure with full data control; sub-2-second latency.
competitors: Kore AI, Sprinklr, Genesys, Five9, Cartesia, Retell AI
investors: Y Combinator (W25), Nexus Venture Partners, Paul Graham, Shopify COO Kaz Nejatian, Ritual Capital, Pioneer Fund, Orange Collective — $4.7M seed

description: AI-powered intake team for law firms that replaces admin/intake staff with voice AI agents answering calls 24/7, qualifying leads, booking consultations, signing retainers, and referring out-of-criteria cases to partner firms for a referral fee.
unique_value: End-to-end intake automation: answers calls, qualifies leads, books consultations, collects retainers, and handles case referrals — all without human involvement.
product_description: AI-powered intake system for law firms that handles voice calls, qualifies leads, books appointments, collects e-signatures for retainers, and refers unqualified cases to partner firms.
how_it_works: Voice AI answers inbound calls 24/7, engages callers in natural conversation to understand their legal issue, qualifies them against firm criteria, schedules consultations, sends retainer agreements via e-signature, and automatically refers non-qualifying cases to partner law firms for a fee.
target_customer: Personal injury, family law, and other consumer law firms seeking to reduce admin costs and capture leads around the clock.
business_model: Unknown (likely SaaS subscription or per-call/per-case pricing).
key_differentiator: Full intake cycle automation including retainer signing and case referral monetization; purpose-built for legal intake workflows.
competitors: Smith.ai, Alert Communications, traditional intake staff

description: Autonomous AI hiring and sourcing platform (tallyhq.com redirects to trycandid.com) that learns a company's hiring bar, engages candidates via personalized email and LinkedIn outreach, and delivers meeting-ready talent.
unique_value: Learns your actual hiring bar from real decisions, not job descriptions, and runs autonomous outreach to deliver pre-qualified, meeting-ready candidates.
product_description: AI recruiting platform that sources, engages, and qualifies candidates autonomously based on actual hiring bar data.
how_it_works: Learns company's hiring bar from past decisions. Searches LinkedIn and other databases. Sends personalized outreach at scale. Qualifies candidates via AI screening. Delivers only meeting-ready candidates to hiring teams.
target_customer: Tech startups and mid-size companies looking to scale recruiting without adding headcount.
business_model: Unknown (likely SaaS subscription or per-hire fee).
key_differentiator: Learns actual hiring bar, not just job descriptions; fully autonomous from sourcing to meeting-scheduling.
